text: Activity metrics: Steps, distance, floors climbed, active calories, and exercise duration Workouts: Type (running, cycling, strength training, etc.), duration, distance, heart rate data, and calories burned Workouts: Type (running, cycling, strength training, etc.), duration, distance, heart rate data, and calories burned Vitals: Heart rate, resting heart rate, heart rate variability (HRV), blood pressure, respiratory rate, and blood oxygen Vitals: Heart rate, resting heart rate, heart rate variability (HRV), blood pressure, respiratory rate, and blood oxygen Body measurements: Weight, height, body mass index, and body fat percentage Body measurements: Weight, height, body mass index, and body fat percentage Sleep: Total sleep time, sleep stages, and time in bed Sleep: Total sleep time, sleep stages, and time in bed Nutrition: Calories consumed, macronutrients, hydration, and micronutrients (if tracked) Nutrition: Calories consumed, macronutrients, hydration, and micronutrients (if tracked) Note: Our memory feature is designed to prevent Claude from using sensitive health information in future conversations. How to use health features Ask Claude a question about your health or fitness data (for example: "How active have I been this week?" or "Show me my sleep trends"). Ask Claude a question about your health or fitness data (for example: "How active have I been this week?" or "Show me my sleep trends"). Claude will request access to your health data through Health Connect if not already granted. Claude will request access to your health data through Health Connect if not already granted. Review the permission prompt and select the data types you want to share. Review the permission prompt and select the data types you want to share. Claude analyzes your data and provides insights, often with visual charts to help you understand trends. Claude analyzes your data and provides insights, often with visual charts to help you understand trends. Example prompts "Help me understand my workout patterns over the past month." "Help me understand my workout patterns over the past month." "I've been sleeping poorly—can you analyze my sleep data and look for patterns?" "I've been sleeping poorly—can you analyze my sleep data and look for patterns?" "Show me how my daily step count compares week over week." "Show me how my daily step count compares week over week." "What's my average resting heart rate, and how has it changed recently?" "What's my average resting heart rate, and how has it changed recently?"
